name: Berrild
description: A female breggle, member of the Wooden Wolves adventuring party. One of her eyes has been replaced by a yellow crystal, which glows under Detect Magic.
notes: Yellow crystal replacing one eye — glows under Detect Magic.
Wears the green and yellow colors of Lord Malbleat.
Traveling to ease Brehder's condition when encountered at the Jaunty Horn.
